---

## Overview

> AI-powered edtech platform for personalized career roadmaps.

**Road Career Guidance** is an advanced web frontend system engineered by **Karthik Idikuda**. 

<br/>

## System Architecture

```mermaid
graph TD;
    A["Browser Client"] -->|"HTTPS"| B["Frontend"];
    B -->|"Component Render"| C["Interactive UI Layer"];

    style A fill:#001a00,stroke:#39ff14,stroke-width:2px,color:#fff
    style B fill:#002200,stroke:#39ff14,stroke-width:2px,color:#fff
    style C fill:#003300,stroke:#39ff14,stroke-width:1px,color:#fff
```

<br/>

## Project Structure

```
Road-Career-Guidance/
  LICENSE
  README.md
  app.js
  colleges.css
  colleges.html
  engine.js
  explore.css
  explore.html
  data/
    career_database.js
    careers.js
    colleges.js
    states.js
```

<br/>

| Attribute | Detail |
|:---|:---|
| **Primary Language** | `HTML` |
| **Project Category** | `Web Frontend` |
| **Total Source Files** | `22` |
